title: Motrico
summary:
Motrico may refer to:

Motrico (horse), a race horse, twice winner of Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe in the 1930s
Mutriku, a town in the coast of Guipuzcoa, Spain, known in Spanish as Motrico
text:
